description_long: This object is a rectangular jewelry display counter with a glass enclosure on the top and sides, allowing clear visibility of the items inside. The display area is divided into several red-bordered sections, each containing neatly arranged jewelry pieces, likely rings, bracelets, or watches, set on white or light-colored pads. The base of the counter is solid, with a gray central panel bordered by dark brown horizontal bands at the top and bottom, giving it a sturdy and elegant appearance. The glass panels are supported by a thin, dark frame, providing both security and an unobstructed view of the contents. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for placement in a jewelry store or commercial retail environment. The counter is designed to be approached from the front, where customers can view the jewelry through the glass.
description: A modern, glass-enclosed jewelry display counter with red-bordered sections and a sturdy gray and brown base, designed for showcasing jewelry in a retail setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass display, red-bordered sections, and the solid gray and brown base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter, the arrangement of jewelry sections, and the thickness of the glass enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the glass panels and sectioned display area, but without customer-facing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the depth and internal arrangement of the jewelry sections.
